user.description: Select your account type and setup method.

extension_wait.title: Waiting for Chrome Extension
extension_wait.description:
1. Install the **Nest Protect Auth Helper** Chrome extension
2. Open [home.nest.com](https://home.nest.com) and sign in
3. Click the extension icon and enter this Home Assistant URL
4. Click **Extract & Send to Home Assistant**

This page will update automatically when credentials are received.

account_link.title: Connect Your Nest Account (Manual)
account_link.description:
Follow these steps to get your credentials:

1. Open an **Incognito/Private** browser window
2. Enable **third-party cookies** in browser settings
3. Go to [home.nest.com](https://home.nest.com) and sign in with Google
4. Open **Developer Tools** (F12) → **Network** tab → Check **Preserve Log**
5. In the filter box, type `issueToken` and copy the full **Request URL**
6. In the filter box, type `oauth2/iframe`, click the last request, and copy the entire **Cookie** header value

⚠️ Do not log out of home.nest.com after copying credentials

data_description.cookies: Complete cookie string from the oauth2/iframe request headers

error.invalid_issue_token: Invalid issue token URL. Must start with https://accounts.google.com/ and contain the issueToken action.
error.invalid_cookies: Invalid cookies format. Ensure you copied the complete cookie header from the oauth2/iframe request.

abort.extension_timeout: Timed out waiting for the Chrome extension. Please try again.
abort.invalid_auth: The credentials received from the extension were invalid. Please try again.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Nest servers. Please try again.
abort.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.
